title: CSR Viewer
description: Inspect subject, SAN, signature algorithm, and public-key details from a certificate signing request.

fields.help: Paste PEM text directly or upload a .csr / .pem file.

placeholders.content: Paste a CSR, for example -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE REQUEST----- ...

notes.title: When to use this
notes.description: Validate SANs, key size, and signature algorithm before sending the request to a CA to avoid mis-issued certificates.

empty.title: Paste or upload a CSR to start
empty.description: The right side focuses on the fields people usually verify before certificate issuance, while keeping the complete OpenSSL text.

errors.title: Inspection failed
errors.requestFailed: CSR inspection failed. Please verify the input format.
